---
title: "Assignment2"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r}


install.packages("msigdbr")
BiocManager::install("fgsea")
install.packages("gprofiler2")
library(gprofiler2)

library(dplyr)
library(msigdbr)
library(fgsea)
library(gprofiler2)
library(ggplot2)












res_f_tbl <- as.data.frame(res_f)

# Thresholded DE sets
sig_female <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)

sig_female_lfc1 <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, abs(logFC) > 1)

up_genes <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, logFC > 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

down_genes <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, logFC < 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

up_genes_lfc1 <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, logFC > 1) %>%
  pull(gene)

down_genes_lfc1 <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, logFC < -1) %>%
  pull(gene)

cat("Female-only thresholded gene sets\n")
cat("Up-regulated, FDR < 0.05:", length(up_genes), "\n")
cat("Down-regulated, FDR < 0.05:", length(down_genes), "\n")
cat("Up-regulated, FDR < 0.05 & log2FC > 1:", length(up_genes_lfc1), "\n")
cat("Down-regulated, FDR < 0.05 & log2FC < -1:", length(down_genes_lfc1), "\n")
```

```{r}
# significant genes
sig_genes <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)

# up-regulated
up_genes <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, logFC > 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

# down-regulated
down_genes <- res_f_tbl %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, logFC < 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

cat("Significant genes:", nrow(sig_genes), "\n")
cat("Up genes:", length(up_genes), "\n")
cat("Down genes:", length(down_genes), "\n")




gene_ranks <- res_f_tbl$t
names(gene_ranks) <- res_f_tbl$gene
gene_ranks <- sort(gene_ranks, decreasing = TRUE)



head(gene_ranks)



msig_h <- msigdbr(
  species = "Homo sapiens",
  category = "H"
)

pathways <- split(msig_h$gene_symbol, msig_h$gs_name)


fgsea_res <- fgsea(
  pathways = pathways,
  stats = gene_ranks,
  minSize = 15,
  maxSize = 500
)

fgsea_res <- fgsea_res[order(fgsea_res$padj), ]

head(fgsea_res)



gost_up <- gost(
  query = up_genes,
  organism = "hsapiens",
  correction_method = "fdr",
  sources = c("GO:BP")
)

gost_down <- gost(
  query = down_genes,
  organism = "hsapiens",
  correction_method = "fdr",
  sources = c("GO:BP")
)

ora_up_tbl <- gost_up$result
ora_down_tbl <- gost_down$result

head(ora_up_tbl)
head(ora_down_tbl)

sum(ora_up_tbl$p_value < 0.05)
sum(ora_down_tbl$p_value < 0.05)
colnames(ora_up_tbl)

ora_up_top <- ora_up_tbl[order(ora_up_tbl$p_value), c("term_name", "p_value", "intersection_size", "term_size")]
ora_down_top <- ora_down_tbl[order(ora_down_tbl$p_value), c("term_name", "p_value", "intersection_size", "term_size")]

head(ora_up_top, 10)
head(ora_down_top, 10)

library(ggplot2)

ora_up_plot <- head(ora_up_top, 10)
ora_up_plot$term_name <- factor(ora_up_plot$term_name, levels = rev(ora_up_plot$term_name))

ggplot(ora_up_plot, aes(x = term_name, y = -log10(p_value))) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top enriched GO Biological Process terms: up-regulated genes",
    x = "GO term",
    y = expression(-log[10](FDR))
  )

ora_down_plot <- head(ora_down_top, 10)
ora_down_plot$term_name <- factor(ora_down_plot$term_name, levels = rev(ora_down_plot$term_name))

ggplot(ora_down_plot, aes(x = term_name, y = -log10(p_value))) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top enriched GO Biological Process terms: down-regulated genes",
    x = "GO term",
    y = expression(-log[10](FDR))
  )


dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave("figures/ora_up_go_bp.png", width = 9, height = 6)
ggsave("figures/ora_down_go_bp.png", width = 9, height = 6)


fgsea_sig <- fgsea_res[fgsea_res$padj < 0.05, ]
head(fgsea_sig, 15)


fgsea_pos <- fgsea_sig[fgsea_sig$NES > 0, ]
fgsea_neg <- fgsea_sig[fgsea_sig$NES < 0, ]

head(fgsea_pos[, c("pathway", "NES", "pval", "padj", "size")], 10)
head(fgsea_neg[, c("pathway", "NES", "pval", "padj", "size")], 10)

cat("Significant GSEA pathways (FDR < 0.05):", nrow(fgsea_sig), "\n")
cat("Positive NES:", nrow(fgsea_pos), "\n")
cat("Negative NES:", nrow(fgsea_neg), "\n")

fgsea_top <- rbind(
  head(fgsea_pos[order(-fgsea_pos$NES), c("pathway", "NES", "padj")], 10),
  head(fgsea_neg[order(fgsea_neg$NES), c("pathway", "NES", "padj")], 10)
)

fgsea_top$pathway <- factor(fgsea_top$pathway, levels = fgsea_top$pathway[order(fgsea_top$NES)])

ggplot(fgsea_top, aes(x = pathway, y = NES)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top enriched Hallmark pathways from GSEA",
    x = "Pathway",
    y = "Normalized enrichment score (NES)"
  )

ggsave("figures/gsea_hallmark_top_pathways.png", width = 9, height = 7)

top_pos_pathway <- fgsea_pos$pathway[which.max(fgsea_pos$NES)]
top_neg_pathway <- fgsea_neg$pathway[which.min(fgsea_neg$NES)]

top_pos_pathway
top_neg_pathway

plotEnrichment(pathways[[top_pos_pathway]], gene_ranks) +
  labs(title = top_pos_pathway)

plotEnrichment(pathways[[top_neg_pathway]], gene_ranks) +
  labs(title = top_neg_pathway)

ggsave("figures/gsea_top_positive_enrichment.png", width = 8, height = 5)
ggsave("figures/gsea_top_negative_enrichment.png", width = 8, height = 5)

rank_tbl <- data.frame(
  gene = names(gene_ranks),
  rank = as.numeric(gene_ranks)
)

write.table(
  rank_tbl,
  file = "ranked_gene_list.rnk",
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  col.names = FALSE
)

fgsea_export <- fgsea_res[, !names(fgsea_res) %in% "leadingEdge"]

write.table(
  fgsea_export,
  file = "fgsea_hallmark_results.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)

pathway_list <- split(msig_h$gene_symbol, msig_h$gs_name)

gmt_lines <- vapply(names(pathway_list), function(pw) {
  paste(c(pw, pw, unique(pathway_list[[pw]])), collapse = "\t")
}, character(1))

writeLines(gmt_lines, "hallmark_hsapiens.gmt")

file.exists("hallmark_hsapiens.gmt")
file.exists("ranked_gene_list.rnk")
file.exists("fgsea_hallmark_results.tsv")


fgsea_pos <- fgsea_res[fgsea_res$NES > 0 & fgsea_res$padj < 0.05, ]
fgsea_neg <- fgsea_res[fgsea_res$NES < 0 & fgsea_res$padj < 0.05, ]

fgsea_pos$leadingEdge <- NULL
fgsea_neg$leadingEdge <- NULL

write.table(
  fgsea_pos,
  "fgsea_positive.tsv",
  sep="\t",
  quote=FALSE,
  row.names=FALSE
)

write.table(
  fgsea_neg,
  "fgsea_negative.tsv",
  sep="\t",
  quote=FALSE,
  row.names=FALSE
)

fgsea_gem <- data.frame(
  name = fgsea_res$pathway,                         
  description = fgsea_res$pathway,                  
  pvalue = fgsea_res$pval,
  qvalue = fgsea_res$padj,
  phenotype = ifelse(fgsea_res$NES >= 0, 1, -1),   
  genes = vapply(fgsea_res$leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ",", character(1)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

fgsea_gem_sig <- subset(fgsea_gem, qvalue < 0.05)

write.table(
  fgsea_gem_sig,
  file = "fgsea_hallmark_generic_em.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)

head(fgsea_gem_sig)
colnames(fgsea_gem_sig)



```



the findings are consistent with what the the article shows. the data set is too small to find any significant data for the
